passive.name: Relentless Assault
passive.description: Jax's consecutive basic attacks continuously increase his Attack Speed.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} {{cis|Jax}} basic attacks generate stacks, up to a cap. Stacks expire one at a time.
wiki_detail.blurb4: {{sbc|Relentless Assault:}} For each stack, '''Jax''' gains {{as|{{sti|'''bonus''' attack speed}}|as}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate:}} '''Jax's''' [[basic attack]]s generate a [[stack]] of ''Relentless Assault'' {{tip|on-attack}} for {{fd|2.5}} seconds, refreshing on subsequent attacks and stacking up to 8 times. Stacks expire by one every {{fd|0.25}} seconds when the duration ends.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Relentless Assault:}} For each stack, '''Jax''' gains {{as|{{sti|{{pp|key=%|3.5 to 11 for 6|1 to 16}} '''bonus''' attack speed}}|as}}, up to a maximum of {{as|{{pp|key=%|28 to 88 for 6|1 to 16}}|attack speed}}.
wiki_detail.description3: {{sbc|Grandmaster at Angling:}} While out-of-combat with champions and idle in the river for 10 seconds, '''Jax''' will occasionally catch a fish, granting him {{g|1}} and {{as|1 ability power}} for 5 seconds. He catches a fish at an average rate of one every 15 seconds. He also has a 5% chance to catch a [[File:Jax Grandmaster at Angling 2.png|link=|20 px]] rare fish that grants {{g|10}} and {{as|10 ability power}} for 5 seconds.
wiki_detail.parry:
|notes        =
* '''Jax''' will start fishing while idle in the river if he is in-combat with only monsters (e.g. any of the three Epic monsters).{{bug|1}}
* '''Jax''' catching a fish is a random event and will play a special animation.
* The total number of fish caught during the game is displayed when fishing as {{ai|Relentless Assault|Jax|Grandmaster at Angling|image=Grandmaster at Angling.png}} passive.

Q.name: Leap Strike
Q.description: Jax leaps toward a unit. If they are an enemy, he strikes them with his weapon.
Q.tooltip: Jax leaps to a friendly or enemy unit or ward, dealing {{ totaldamage }} physical damage if it is an enemy.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Jax}} {{tip|dash|dashes}} to the target unit. If they are an enemy, he deals {{as|physical damage}}.
wiki_detail.description2: If the target is an enemy and they are in range upon arrival, '''Jax''' deals them {{as|physical damage}}.
wiki_detail.description3: '''''Jax''' can cast any of his [[champion ability|abilities]] during the dash.''
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Leap Strike'' cannot be cast on [[structures]].
* If the target is an enemy champion, '''Jax''' will be ordered to basic attack them after the dash ends.
* {{tip|Spell shield}} will block the damage, including when {{ai|Empower|Jax|empowered}}.

W.name: Empower
W.description: Jax charges his weapon with energy, causing his next attack to deal additional damage.
W.tooltip: Jax charges his weapon with energy, causing his next Attack or Leap Strike to deal an additional {{ totaldamage }} magic damage.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{cis|Jax}} empowers his next basic attack or ''{{ai|Leap Strike|Jax}}'' against an enemy to deal {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Jax''' empowers his next [[basic attack]] or ''{{ai|Leap Strike|Jax}}'' against an enemy within 10 seconds to deal {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}}, reduced to 50% against [[structures]]. If ''Empower'' is used on a basic attack, it will gain {{sti|range|50 '''bonus''' range}} and have an {{tip|uncancellable windup}}.

E.name: Counter Strike
E.description: Jax's combat prowess allows him to dodge all incoming attacks for a short duration and then quickly counterattack, stunning all surrounding enemies.
E.tooltip:
Jax enters a defensive stance for up to {{ dodgeduration }} seconds, dodging incoming Attacks and taking {{ aoedamagereduction }}% less damage from area of effect Abilities. After {{ dodgeduration }} seconds or Recasting, Jax deals {{ totaldamage }} + {{ percenthealthdamage }}% max Health magic damage and Stuns nearby enemies for {{ stunduration }} second. 

The damage is increased by {{ percentincreasedperdodge*100 }}% per Attack dodged, up to a maximum of {{ maxdamage }} + {{ maxpercenthealthdamage }}% max Health.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Jax}} enters ''Evasion'' for a short time: a defensive stance that causes him to {{tip|dodge}} all incoming non-{{tip|turret}} basic attacks and take reduced damage from all {{tip|area of effect}} abilities from {{tip|champions}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: ''Counter Strike'' can be recast within this time, and does so automatically after the duration.
wiki_detail.blurb3: {{sbc|Recast:}} '''Jax''' deals {{as|magic damage}} and {{tip|stun|stuns}} nearby enemies, the damage is increased if he dodged more attacks.
wiki_detail.description:
{{sbc|Active:}} '''Jax''' enters ''Evasion'' for 2 seconds: a defensive stance that causes him to {{tip|dodge}} all incoming non-{{tip|turret}} basic attacks and take 25% reduced damage from all [[area of effect]] abilities from {{tip|champions}}.

''Counter Strike'' can be recast after 1 second, and does so automatically after the duration.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Recast:}} '''Jax''' deals {{as|magic damage}} to nearby enemies, with the '''total''' damage increased by 20% for each attack dodged, up to a 100% increase, and {{tip|stun|stuns}} them for 1 second.
wiki_detail.leveling2: {{st|Minimum Magic Damage|{{ap|40 to 160}} {{as|(+ 70% AP)}} {{as|(+ {{fd|3.5}}% of target's '''maximum''' health)}}|Maximum Magic Damage|{{ap|40*2 to 160*2}} {{as|(+ {{ap|70*2}}% AP)}} {{as|(+ {{ap|3.5*2}}% of target's '''maximum''' health)}}}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* The initial cast and the manual recast count as ability activations for the purposes of on-cast effects such as {{tip|Spellblade}} and triggering {{ais|Force Pulse|Kassadin}} passive.
* ''Counter Strike'' will also dodge abilities that can trigger [[on-hit effect]]s ({{ai|Parrrley|Gangplank}}, {{ai|Mystic Shot|Ezreal}}) which will count towards ''Counter Strike's'' increased damage. There are exceptions however.

R.name: Grandmaster-at-Arms
R.description: Every third consecutive attack deals additional Magic Damage. Additionally, Jax can activate this ability to deal damage around himself and strengthen his resolve, increasing his Armor and Magic Resist for a short duration.
R.tooltip:
Passive: Every third Attack within {{ passivefallofftime }} seconds deals an additional {{ onhitdamage }} magic damage.

Active: Jax slams his lantern down, dealing {{ swingdamagetotal }} magic damage to nearby enemies. If he hits a champion he gains {{ basearmor }} Armor and {{ basemr }} Magic Resist plus {{ bonusarmor }} Armor and {{ bonusmr }} Magic Resist per additional champion hit for {{ duration }} seconds. During this time every second Attack deals additional magic damage instead of every third.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}
